# WDS Documentation Navigator

Wix Design System component reference. Use when building UI with @wix/design-system, choosing components, or checking props and examples. Triggers on "what component", "how do I make", "WDS", "show me props", or component names like Button, Card, Modal, Box, Text.

## Installation

Install a specific skill:

Shorthand:

```bash
npx skills add wix-private/skills --skill wds-docs
```

SSH:

```bash
npx skills add git@github.com:wix-private/skills.git --skill wds-docs
```

Install all skills from this repo:

Shorthand:

```bash
npx skills add wix-private/skills
```

SSH:

```bash
npx skills add git@github.com:wix-private/skills.git
```

## Structure

```
wds-docs/
  SKILL.md              # Skill definition
  references/           # Supporting documentation
```
